description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with a flat green roof and a symmetrical layout. The main building is flanked by two smaller wings, each with their own flat green roofs, and the front is landscaped with trees, shrubs, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The facade is punctuated by tall, narrow windows and a central entryway, while the sides and rear of the house are more minimal, with additional outdoor patio spaces and driveways. The exterior walls are a light, neutral color, likely finished in stucco or concrete, and the overall structure is low and wide. The property includes a parking area in front, with a single car visible, and the landscaping is neatly organized with geometric precision. The house exudes a contemporary, minimalist aesthetic with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with symmetrical wings, landscaped front yard, and minimalist design. The exterior is light-colored with tall windows and geometric greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped yard with trees and shrubs, parking area, and symmetrical wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and the arrangement of trees and patios along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roofs of all sections, minimal window openings, and patio spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the garage, driveway, and side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of tall, narrow windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, flanked by tall shrubs and trees, minimalistic door, and no porch or overhang.
